name: Nacho Cheese Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 package (5.25 oz.) dry au gratin potatoes
1 can (15.25 oz.) whole kernel corn - undrained
1 can (2.25 oz.) sliced ripe olives - drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine potatoes, corn, picante sauce, and water.
Bring to a boil; reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 25 minutes or until potatoes are tender, stirring occasionally.
2. Add the dry cheese sauce mix from the au gratin potato package, milk, grated cheddar cheese, and sliced ripe olives (drained).
Cook until cheese is melted and soup is heated through, stirring occasionally.
3. Serve with chips.
Makes 8 cups.
